badge.first-question: First question — you asked the agent your first question and it landed in your progress file.
badge.first-quiz: First quiz — you completed your first end-of-module quiz.
badge.polyglot: Polyglot — you've worked with the agent in more than one language.
badge.night-owl: Night owl — you held a learning session past 22:00.
badge.early-bird: Early bird — you held a learning session before 07:00.
badge.first-good-investigation: First good investigation — you walked through the OEM-A flicker scenario without taking the wrong branch first.
badge.completionist: Completionist — you finished main topic {{suffix}} cleanly.
badge.simulator: Simulator pro — you walked through the {{suffix}} simulator without missteps.
